reviews.comment:
Siguen sin tener el baño de discapacitados abierto y si está ,no tiene traba.

They still don't have the disabled bathroom open, and if it is, it's not accessible.

(Translated by Google)
Good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNWdEtTd1RBEAE

reviews.comment:
Lugares para el descanso y refrigerio con amplia arboleda, mesas y asientos, todo muy bien, óptimo luego de una ruta pesada. Baños bien limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Rest and refreshment areas with plenty of trees, tables, and seating, all very nice, perfect after a tough hike. The restrooms are very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNWcE5yZzBRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estación sin nada que marque una diferencia. Me pareció un robo cobrar $300 el agua para el mate.

(Translated by Google)
A station with nothing that makes it stand out. I thought it was a rip-off to charge $300 for water for mate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNWaE1yZTVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Te atienden bien. Pero no me parece que primero pidas la comida y con ella en mano tengas que ir a pagar. La contaminación cruzada entre billetera, dinero o tarjetas y la bandeja de comida en mano es terrible

(Translated by Google)
The service is good. But I don't think it's right that you order your food first and then have to go pay with it in your hand. The cross-contamination between your wallet, money, or cards and the food tray is terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURsdThUcTR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo para hacer un alto en el viaje hacia la costa. Hermosa arboleda, sanitarios impecables y muy buena atencion

(Translated by Google)
A lovely place to stop on the way to the coast. Beautiful trees, spotless restrooms, and excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURsaFpiMHhRRRAB
